server/src/image_tool/heic/boxes.py :: HeicContainerInfo
class HeicContainerInfo:
    major_brand: str = ""
    compatible_brands: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    width: int | None = None
    height: int | None = None
    box_types: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)

    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, object]:
        return {
            "major_brand": self.major_brand,
            "compatible_brands": list(self.compatible_brands),
            "width": self.width,
            "height": self.height,
            "box_types": list(self.box_types),
        }

server/src/image_tool/heic/boxes.py :: iter_boxes
def iter_boxes(data: bytes, start: int = 0, end: int | None = None):
    end = len(data) if end is None else end
    offset = start
    while offset + 8 <= end:
        header = read_box_header(data, offset)
        yield header
        offset = header.end_offset
